title: The Shrine's Answer
description: The ancient shrine has not forgotten your visit.

honored_shrine.title: The Shrine's Blessing
honored_shrine.description: Warm light gathers around your footsteps. The offering you left has been accepted, and something unseen walks beside you.

searched_shrine.title: What the Stones Concealed
searched_shrine.description: Dust falls from an object hidden in your pack. Something from beneath the shrine's stones has awakened.

desecrated_shrine.title: The Shrine's Curse
desecrated_shrine.description: Fresh flowers wither wherever you pass. The presence from the shrine has followed you, and it is no longer silent.

options.title: Accept the Sign
options.description: Acknowledge the power and accept whatever lesson it carries.

options.title: Claim the Relic
options.description: Power is useful whether it arrives as blessing or curse.

options.title: Break the Connection
options.description: Refuse to let an ancient presence decide who you become.
